title: Clever Bit
lyrics: You're supposed to be here You're supposed to be here Don't you think you're clever? That you're clever being such a clever man That you didn't want this in the first place Now you wanna come and say that I'm black That's what you wanna say Fuck you, I bet you made it, you're so clever, huh? Aren't you so fucking clever? Wouldn't you destroy the whole race if you're laughing at your bullshit? I know you wanna fuck other dudes I've seen you wanna look at them I don't care, cause I told you I was about that at the book, man But now you wanna call it on me and say I'm jealous And I just want communication, I just want cooperation I don't even like that, you've been fucked a thousand times since Wednesday But when you put my emotional levels down here, you just make me hurt Thursday, Wednesday, what's that? Am I lost in the gothic plans? Am I lost in the gothic you? Now I just don't measure up to your spoon Well, fuck all your spoons, you feel me? I bet you think you're clever now Cleverly I walk the fuck away Never knew that you could feel this way until I'm gone Disaster inside your lung Watch out for that crazy old bird Yes, I am You're asking my aid, Lord, no more It doesn't matter, bet you think you're clever Bet you think you're all that now Bag of sticks, forget the contemplated Thoughts inside your brain while you never remember any of this Fuck you I bet you think you're so fucking clever Fuck you You die in your own mind Flippin' over, now I'm lost Lost in the thing that said you were me She's got all the jewels running over my body Inside of me where she might say Fuck you Bet you think you're clever now Because you got rid of another asshole You seriously got rid of another man But you're still jelly on the floor thinking that you can understand But you don't even wanna be a lesbian What did I say to you? You want love inside your life, but you don't wanna share You got three hearts, one die, got them over there But I don't know if you know that you're near So goodbye, clever bitch, you're fucking dead I hope you get your wish I hope life's just suffering for everyone that's hurt you Fuck you, I'ma stand here and never wonder if it's over So while you see me walking out that door Yeah, I bet you think you're clever Leave me here and you can get me back any time I hope you think it's just a matter that whether or not I fucking come to your rescue Your rescue I've got a deep-seated mentality and you fucking cry My paradise, God, I'm sorry Yes, yes, yes, yes, yes, yes I'm glad that you're inside that fucking Dehydrated love that was rubbed with fear I thought we both something to nick, you're clever But you're like, nah, fuck you, dude I'm too clever for you Well, aren't you, baby? Cause I can still see your dumb ass Thanks for watching!
